title: POLAND enforcement action against Komendanta Miejskiego Policji w Krakowie (18,500)
summary: Non-compliance with general data processing principles The Polish DPA has imposd a fine of EUR 18,500 on the Komendanta Miejskiego Policji w Krakowie. The controller published personal data, including health data, of a data subject that had been involved in a police investigation, which was not necessary for the purpose of the publication...
